## 🔄 Type of Change

**Select the type(s) of change this PR introduces:**

- [ ] 🐛 **Bug fix** (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ **New feature** (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 **Breaking change** (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📖 **Documentation update** (changes to documentation only)
- [ ] ⚡ **Performance improvement** (code changes that improve performance)
- [ ] 🔧 **Code refactoring** (code changes that neither fix bugs nor add features)
- [ ] 🧪 **Test improvements** (adding or updating tests)
- [ ] 🏗️ **Build/CI changes** (changes to build process or CI/CD)
- [ ] 🎨 **Style changes** (formatting, missing semicolons, etc.; no code logic changes)

---

## 📱 Framework Impact

**Which analysis frameworks are affected by this change?**

- [ ] ☕ **Java/Kotlin** APK analysis
- [ ] ⚛️ **React Native** APK analysis
- [ ] 🦋 **Flutter** APK analysis
- [ ] 🔄 **Cross-platform** (affects all frameworks)
- [ ] 🛠️ **Tool infrastructure** (CLI, setup, dependencies)
- [ ] 🤖 **AI/LLM integration** (Groq, Ollama)
- [ ] 🚀 **Dynamic analysis** (MobSF integration)
- [ ] 📊 **Output/Reporting** (result organization, formats)

## 🧪 Testing & Validation

### **Local Testing**
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have run the complete test suite (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] I have run linting and formatting (`black`, `flake8`, `mypy`)
- [ ] I have run `lu77u-mobilesec doctor` to verify dependencies

### **APK Testing**
- [ ] Tested with **Java/Kotlin** APK samples
- [ ] Tested with **React Native** APK samples  
- [ ] Tested with **Flutter** APK samples
- [ ] Tested with **large APKs** (>50MB)
- [ ] Tested with **obfuscated APKs**
- [ ] Tested **edge cases** and error conditions

### **Integration Testing**
- [ ] Tested **CLI interface** and all relevant flags
- [ ] Tested **interactive mode** functionality
- [ ] Tested **AI integration** (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested **dynamic analysis** (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested **cross-platform compatibility** (if applicable)

### **New Tests Added**
- [ ] Unit tests for new functionality
- [ ] Integration tests for complex workflows
- [ ] Test cases for error conditions
- [ ] Performance tests (if applicable)
- [ ] No new tests needed (documentation/minor changes only)

## 📊 Code Quality & Standards

### **Code Review Checklist**
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards (PEP 8)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have added/updated docstrings for new functions and classes
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or linting errors
- [ ] I have used type hints appropriately

### **Documentation Updates**
- [ ] Updated **README.md** (if user-facing changes)
- [ ] Updated **CHANGELOG.md** (for significant changes)
- [ ] Updated **API documentation** (for new functions/classes)
- [ ] Updated **CLI help text** (for new options/commands)
- [ ] Updated **troubleshooting guide** (if applicable)
- [ ] No documentation updates needed

## 📋 Final Checklist

**Before requesting review, ensure:**

- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] Code is properly formatted and linted
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] Changes are atomic and focused
- [ ] Commit messages follow project conventions
- [ ] PR description is complete and accurate
- [ ] No sensitive information (API keys, secrets) included
- [ ] Ready for code review

**For reviewers:**
- [ ] Code review completed
- [ ] Testing validation confirmed
- [ ] Documentation review completed
- [ ] Security review completed (if applicable)
- [ ] Performance review completed (if applicable)
